content.text:
Question:
                                How many days ago did I go on a whitewater rafting trip in the Oregon mountains?

                                Question date:
                                2023/06/20 (Tue) 12:29

                                Noisy expected-answer label:
                                3 days ago. 4 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

                                Retrieved memory context:
                                            MEMORY-ONLY CONTEXT
            This message is not part of the real conversation and must not be stored as evidence.
            The retrieved memory below was selected for the immediately following user request.
            Treat it as the strongest available remembered context, stronger than guesses, defaults, or general world knowledge.
            Use selected active memory for the answer unless it is clearly irrelevant, insufficient, stale, internally conflicting, or contradicted by the current user message.
            Do not claim that raw sources are verified facts; prefer active claims for facts, notes for rationale, and action items for commitments.
            If raw source wording conflicts with active typed memory, trust the active typed memory for current facts.
            
            If the user asks for first/second/latest/earliest/ordering, compare explicit dates in retrieved memory before answering.
            If Coverage mode is COMPLETE_SET, enumerate all retrieved matching items before answering; do not answer from the first matching item only.
            If the user asks for an exact quote, exact wording, source, or when something was said, prefer the complete source text from Retrieved evidence; evidence quote fields are short excerpts and may be incomplete.
            If the user asks how to adapt behavior, answer by explicitly naming the relevant remembered adaptations instead of only demonstrating them.

            Namespace: benchmark:longmemeval:gpt4_7ddcf75f
            Answer mode: FACTUAL
            Coverage mode: COMPLETE_SET
            Require evidence fallback: true

            Retrieved profile:
            none

            Retrieved action items:
            none

            Retrieved claims:
            - claim hot-path-20366560d5e1-claim-6 [ACTIVE] attended_event family=attended_event: The user attended a whitewater rafting trip in the Oregon mountains with a group of coworkers on 2023-06-17.; scope=Dated personal event for the user.; context="The user said they had just gotten back from the rafting trip today during a session dated 2023-06-17."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 quote="I just got back from an amazing whitewater rafting trip in the Oregon mountains with a group of coworkers today"
- claim hot-path-20366560d5e1-claim-8 [ACTIVE] has_goal family=has_goal: The user plans to use the GoPro Hero8 Black to capture both video and photos during a full day of whitewater rafting and camping.; scope=Outdoor adventure camera usage plan.; context="The user asked about expected battery life under this planned usage scenario."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 quote="during a full day of whitewater rafting and camping, considering I'll be using it to capture both video and photos"
- claim hot-path-20366560d5e1-claim-5 [ACTIVE] has_goal family=has_goal: The user is looking for recommendations on waterproof cameras for their next outdoor adventure.; scope=Reusable recommendation context for the user's outdoor adventure camera shopping.; context="The user asked for waterproof camera recommendations after a whitewater rafting trip where they wished they had a waterproof camera."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 quote="I'm looking for some recommendations on waterproof cameras for my next outdoor adventure."
- claim hot-path-20366560d5e1-claim-7 [ACTIVE] prefers family=prefers: The user is particularly interested in the GoPro Hero8 Black as a waterproof camera option because they have heard great things about its video quality.; scope=Product interest for waterproof/action camera recommendations.; context="The preference is in the context of selecting a waterproof camera for outdoor adventures and whitewater rafting."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 quote="I'm particularly interested in the GoPro Hero8 Black, as I've heard great things about its video quality."
- claim hot-path-20366560d5e1-claim-9 [ACTIVE] has_goal family=has_goal: The user plans to bring a 10,000mAh power bank to keep devices charged during the camping portion of their trip.; scope=Camping power setup for the user's outdoor trip.; context="The user asked whether this power bank would be sufficient to charge the GoPro Hero8 Black a few times."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 quote="I'm planning to bring a portable power bank to keep my devices charged during the camping portion of my trip."
- claim hot-path-20366560d5e1-claim-10 [ACTIVE] has_goal family=has_goal: The user plans to bring a 7W solar charger to keep their 10,000mAh power bank charged during the camping portion of their trip.; scope=Camping power setup for the user's outdoor trip.; context="The user asked whether a 7W solar charger would charge the 10,000mAh power bank in a reasonable amount of time."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 quote="I'm planning to bring a solar charger to keep my power bank charged during the camping portion of my trip."
- claim hot-path-20366560d5e1-claim-11 [ACTIVE] generated_artifact_detail family=generated_artifact_detail: In the imported recommendation conversation, the assistant estimated that a 10,000mAh power bank would likely charge a GoPro Hero8 Black around 6-8 times in real-world conditions.; scope=Imported LongMemEval past chat session about waterproof camera and camping power recommendations.; context="This estimate was calculated using the GoPro Hero8 Black's approximate 1,220mAh battery capacity and accounting for charging inefficiencies."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 quote="a 10,000mAh power bank will likely charge your Hero8 Black around 6-8 times"
- claim hot-path-20366560d5e1-claim-12 [ACTIVE] generated_artifact_detail family=generated_artifact_detail: In the imported recommendation conversation, the assistant estimated that a 7W solar charger should charge a 10,000mAh power bank to around 80-90% capacity in 6-8 hours of peak sun.; scope=Imported LongMemEval past chat session about waterproof camera and camping power recommendations.; context="This estimate assumed about 6 hours of peak sun per day and about 1.4A output from a 7W, 5V solar charger."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 quote="a 7W solar charger should be able to charge your 10,000mAh power bank to around 80-90% capacity in 6-8 hours of peak sun"

            Retrieved notes:
            - note hot-path-20366560d5e1-note-3 [CONTEXT/ACTIVE]: Hero8 Black rafting capture setup advice; For GoPro Hero8 Black use during whitewater rafting, prior advice emphasized HyperSmooth 2.0 for high-shake video, burst/SuperPhoto/RAW for stills, secure helmet or chest mounting, waterproof case protection, and experimenting with FOV and mounting angles.; scope=Reusable setup and usage guidance for GoPro Hero8 Black in whitewater rafting conditions; evidence=SUMMARIZED source=external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 quote="Mount your camera securely to your helmet, chest, or other stable platform"
- note hot-path-20366560d5e1-note-2 [CONTEXT/ACTIVE]: Waterproof camera choice context for whitewater rafting; For future outdoor water activities such as whitewater rafting, the user was interested in waterproof camera recommendations and became particularly focused on the GoPro Hero8 Black because of its video quality and suitability for high-shake river footage.; scope=User camera planning context for whitewater rafting and similar outdoor water adventures; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 quote="I'm particularly interested in the GoPro Hero8 Black, as I've heard great things about its video quality."

            Retrieved evidence:
            - source external:provided-text:68aef8a514798e610b3499ea2de4a690 [external_record ref=longmemeval:gpt4_7ddcf75f:session:1 observedAt=1970-01-01T00:00:00Z]: ...[matching excerpts]...
LongMemEval past chat session.
Session date: 2023/06/17 (Sat) 22:28
Transcript:
user: I'm looking for some recommendations on waterproof cameras for my next outdoor adventure. By the way, I just got back from an amazing whitewater rafting trip in the Oregon mountains with a group of coworkers today, and I wish I had a waterproof camera to capture some of the thrilling moments on the river.
assistant: What an exciting adventure! I'm glad you had a blast on your whitewater rafting trip! Sorry to hear you didn't have a waterproof camera to capture those unforgettable moments, but that's a great excuse to get one for your next adventure!...
...user: I'm particularly interested in the GoPro Hero8 Black, as I've heard great things about its video quality. Can you tell me more about its stabilization feature? Does it work well in high-shake scenarios like whitewater rafting?...
...In high-shake scenarios like whitewater rafting, HyperSmooth 2.0 is designed to deliver remarkably stable footage. It can handle intense vibrations, bumps, and movements, producing a video that looks like it was shot with a professional-grade stabilizer....
...2. **Enhanced performance in high-shake scenarios**: GoPro's advanced algorithms and high-speed gyroscope work together to provide incredible stabilization in situations like whitewater rafting, mountain biking, or off-roading....
...In your case, whitewater rafting is an ideal scenario for the Hero8 Black's HyperSmooth 2.0. With its rugged design, waterproofing, and incredible stabilization, you'll be able to capture breathtaking footage of your thrilling adventure....
...user: Can I use the Hero8 Black to capture photos during whitewater rafting as well, or is it more geared towards video?
assistant: While the GoPro Hero8 Black is indeed a powerhouse for video capture, it's also an excellent camera for still photography, especially in action-packed scenarios like whitewater rafting.

The Hero8 Black's 12-megapixel sensor and improved image processing capabilities make it capable of capturing stunning still photos, even in challenging lighting conditions. Here are some reasons why you'll love using the Hero8 Black for photography during your whitewater rafting adventure:...
...2. **Burst mode**: The Hero8 Black features a fast burst mode, allowing you to capture up to 25 photos in a single second. This is perfect for catching the perfect moment during your whitewater rafting adventure....
...To get the most out of your still photography experience with the Hero8 Black during whitewater rafting, keep the following tips in mind:...
...The Hero8 Black is an excellent choice for both video and photography during your whitewater rafting adventure. With its rugged design, improved image quality, and advanced features, you'll be able to capture stunning visuals that will make your friends and family feel like they're right there with you on the river!
user: I'm curious about the battery life of the Hero8 Black. How long can I expect the battery to last during a full day of whitewater rafting and camping, considering I'll be using it to capture both video and photos?
assistant: The GoPro Hero8 Black's battery life is a crucial aspect to consider, especially when you're planning an action-packed day of whitewater rafting and camping....
...Assuming you'll be using the Hero8 Black to capture a mix of video and photos during your whitewater rafting and camping adventure, here are some general guidelines for battery life:...
...To give you a better estimate, here's a rough breakdown of the Hero8 Black's battery life during a full day of whitewater rafting and camping:...
...* A 7W solar charger can produce around 1.4A of current (7W ÷ 5V)....

            Retrieved entities:
            - entity entity:<0> [CONCEPT]: whitewater rafting; Concept named whitewater rafting.
- entity entity:<1> [PRODUCT]: 10,000mAh power bank; Product named 10,000mAh power bank.
- entity entity:<2> [PRODUCT]: 7W solar charger; Product named 7W solar charger.
- entity entity:<3> [PRODUCT]: GoPro Hero8 Black; Product named GoPro Hero8 Black.
- entity entity:<4> [TECHNOLOGY]: HyperSmooth 2.0; Technology named HyperSmooth 2.0.
- entity entity:<5> [USER]: User; The user interacting with this agent.

            Retrieved episodes:
            none

hypothesis.description: Short answer that can be produced from the retrieved memory context.

reason.description: One short sentence explaining the judgement.

supported.description: Whether retrieved memory is sufficient to support the expected answer.

systemPrompts:
You are an objective evaluator for a long-term-memory benchmark.
Decide whether the retrieved memory context is sufficient to answer the question in the same core direction as the noisy expected-answer label.
Retrieved memory context is the only source of truth. The expected-answer label is a comparison hint, not evidence.
Mark supported=true when the context contains equivalent source-grounded facts, preferences, events, or rationale, even if wording differs.
For imported chat transcripts, source-grounded support may come from adjacent turns and the active topic, not only from one sentence that literally repeats the answer.
Accept a strong conversational entailment when the expected answer follows from the surrounding user/assistant turns and no other retrieved source points to a competing answer.
Details that appear only in the expected-answer label but not in retrieved memory are non-binding and must not be called central unless the retrieved context itself makes them necessary for answering the question.
The official expected answer can contain noisy illustrative examples or broad inferences not literally present in the source. Do not require every illustrative example when the memory supports the central answer.
For preference or personalization questions, supported=true when the retrieved memory contains the concrete user-specific consideration needed to personalize the answer in the same core direction, even if the expected answer lists additional absent examples.
Do not mark unsupported solely because the official answer names an extra participant, pet name, or causal detail that is absent from the retrieved source while the central remembered event, preference, count, or rationale is still supported.
Mark supported=false when the context is missing the central answer, contradicts it, leaves several plausible competing answers, or only supports a weaker unrelated subset.
Return only the configured JSON object.
